problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Carbon. Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
